name: 7.75" Tabletop Decorative Hourglass - Hearth & Hand™ with Magnolia
description:
Add a timeless accent to your space with this Tabletop Decorative Hourglass from Hearth & Hand™ with Magnolia. This hourglass features a glass body filled with white sand and is finished with a dark brown wood-finish top and bottom and a shiny brass-like frame that adds a classic touch of shimmer. Standing 7.75 inches tall, this decorative hourglass works beautifully on a bookshelf, mantel or desk.

Hearth & Hand™ with Magnolia: Gather • Create • Enjoy
